name: Aowei Holding Limited
summary: Aowei Holding Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, mining, processing, and sale of iron ore products in the People's Republic of China. The company's principal products include iron ores, preliminary concentrates, and iron ore concentrates. It owns and operates three iron ore mines, including Wang'ergou Mine that covers an area of approximately 1.5287 square kilometers situated in Zoumayi Village, Laiyuan County; Shuanmazhuang Mine, which covers an area of approximately 2.1871 square kilometers located in Zoumayi Village, Laiyuan County; and Zhijiazhuang Mine covering an area of approximately 0.3337 square kilometers situated in Yangjiazhuang Village, Laiyuan County. Aowei Holding Limited also provides hospital management services; establishes specialist clinics; and supplies medical consumables and nursing services. In addition, it is also engaged in supply chain business. The company was formerly known as Hengshi Mining Investments Limited and changed its name to Aowei Holding Limited in November 2017. Aowei Holding Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
